problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
mechanism: CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway
hypothesis: CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway may resolve What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 17 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
